visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a woman's face as she holds a green, oval-shaped object covered in white, soapy-looking foam near her mouth, wearing a grey shirt against a plain wall. (2) The scene shifts to her opening a light wooden box containing four vibrant, oval-shaped items in green, pink, purple, and yellow, nestled in white paper. (3) She picks up the yellow item, which is wrapped in clear plastic film, and begins to peel it off with her hands before taking a large bite, revealing a white and dark-colored filling. (4) In a rapid sequence of cuts, she is seen biting into the pink item, then the purple item, and finally the green item, each time displaying an expressive, delighted facial reaction. (5) During the final phase, she pulls the green item away from her mouth after a bite, demonstrating its extreme elasticity as it stretches significantly without breaking, while she gestures with her hands.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國人為了這個排隊? 🌈可以吃的肥皂🧼. [Subtitle]: 可以吃的肥皂?. (2) [Subtitle]: 在韓國百貨公司買了. [Subtitle]: 其實是韓國的年糕🇰🇷. [Slogan]: 艾草 草莓 地瓜 南瓜. (3) [Slogan]: 南瓜口味. [Subtitle]: 要先把包在年糕外面的塑膠膜撕掉喔. [Subtitle]: 裡面有紅豆沙+Cream起司. [Subtitle]: 而且吃起來是奶油起司混合一點鹹鹹奶油的味道～🧀😋. (4) [Slogan]: 草莓口味 🍓. [Subtitle]: 口感真的太好了！！！. [Subtitle]: 但其實草莓味道不重. [Subtitle]: 這個比芋圓還要更Q更有嚼勁. (5) [Slogan]: 地瓜口味 🍠. [Subtitle]: 地瓜控必吃！. [Subtitle]: 吃起來超像冰淇淋. (6) [Slogan]: 艾草口味 🌿. [Subtitle]: 通常韓國的艾草年糕通常味道很香. [Variety]: (思考中). [Subtitle]: 不夠艾草！！！！. [Variety]: (艾草控在這邊). (7) [Subtitle]: 像台灣人喜歡吃香菜一樣 韓國人非常喜歡吃艾草口味. [Subtitle]: 雖然兩種有點味道不一樣. [Subtitle]: 但我如果要吃一個口味就一定要吃這種口味我會選艾草. (8) [Subtitle]: 大家最想吃看看哪一個口味呢？. [Subtitle]: 可以底下留言告訴我！！！

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One female creator is the sole person appearing on camera throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a simple grey short-sleeved t-shirt, with natural makeup and expressive facial features.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor residential setting with a plain, off-white wall and a glimpse of a wooden door frame in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a bright, percussive electronic beat at 128 BPM. An energetic female voice speaks rapidly with high pitch variability, accompanied by a sharp 'pop' sound effect as she reveals the 'soap'. (2) A wooden 'clack' sound marks the opening of the box, followed by the sound of crinkling plastic as she unwraps the food. Her voice maintains high arousal, describing the flavors. (3) Soft chewing sounds are audible during the eating segments, interspersed with a recurring 'ding' bell sound effect that highlights each new flavor mentioned. (4) The speaker's tone remains cheerful and inquisitive throughout, ending with a rising intonation and a playful cartoonish 'whoosh' sound during the final hand gesture.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Item Discovery -> Flavor-by-flavor Review -> Audience Engagement.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a unique Korean snack—rice cakes that visually resemble soap—by showcasing their aesthetic appeal, fillings, and chewy texture to pique audience curiosity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator describes buying the product at a department store and provides a personal review without specific brand focus or CTA beyond engagement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form vlog editing with high text density and frequent sound effects to maintain high viewer engagement.
